name: Chocolate Chip Cookie, the Ultimate
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Milk Chocolate Chips (can substitute semi-sweet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cream Crisco and brown sugar with milk and vanilla until smooth.
3. Blend in the egg.
4. Gradually mix in flour, salt, and baking soda.
5. Gradually add chocolate chips and nuts.
6. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes. Do not overbake.
